message:
feat(ui): smart terminal editor dispatch for O key

Detects $EDITOR/$VISUAL and dispatches to terminal editors (vim, helix,
nano, etc.) by suspending the TUI. After editing, parses frontmatter
changes and applies via br update.

Ref #134

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
